title: euphorbia deltoidea subsp. adhaerens
intro: Euphorbia deltoidea subsp. adhaerens, also known as the sticky euphorbia or firestick, is a plant species in the Euphorbiaceae family. It is primarily known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, derived from its latex and roots. The plant's medicinal properties have been associated with various health benefits, including pain relief, wound healing, and anti-cancer properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a paste, infusion, or decoction, and used to treat a range of ailments, including skin conditions and fever.
